response.original_title: A new story about our planet
response.overview: The Earth and life on it influence each other. Animals, plants, and inanimate matter form habitats. But today, humankind is disrupting this dynamic cycle.  This documentary tells the evolutionary story of our planet, in which the history of humanity represents only a brief moment. Rock existed on our planet long before the formation of oceans, forests, plants, and even air. From the beginning, it was the foundation of creation and played a decisive role in the history of the Earth and its evolution. The film describes how inanimate matter created life, shaped landscapes, and gave rise to civilizations.
response.title: A new story about our planet
